title: Intro
body:
<<Torres>> <<TMiff>>  Stanley. What are you up to this time?
<<Stanley>> <<SSilly>>  Now now, Torres! That's no way to greet a friend!
<<Torres>> <<Tangry>>  You're always up to something, Stanley. What do you want?
[[torres1]]

title: torres1_correct
body:
<<Torres>> <<TMiff>>  Her Majesty needs me?
<<Stanley>> <<STalk>>  Yes, indeed! A request of utmost urgency that only you, her dear knight, can handle!
<<Torres>> <<TTalk>>   ...I see. And what request would this be?
<<Stanley>> (I've made some progress!)
[[torres2]]

title: torres1_wrong1
body:
<<Torres>><<TMiff>>  A child? Forgive me, but I'm better at protecting children, not comforting. Aren't [i]you[/i] better suited for that, Stanley?
<<Stanley>><<SSilly>>  That's true... I've always been the more popular one amongst the children too!
<<Torres>> [i]Sighs[/i] Right. Well, if there isn't anything else, leave me be. I've got things to do.
<<Stanley>><<SShock>>  Wait, hold on now, my friend! There's actually another thing I have to talk to you about!
[[torres1_check]]

title: torres1_wrong2
body:
<<Torres>><<TMiff>>  [i]*squints*[/i] A... cat? Stanley, can't you just use your magic to get the cat down?
<<Stanley>><<SSilly>>  I... Well, I suppose so! That must have slipped my mind, haha..!
<<Torres>> Right... Well, if there isn't anything else, leave me be. I've got things to do.
<<Stanley>><<SShock>>  Wait, hold on now, my friend! There's actually another thing I have to talk to you about!
[[torres1_check]]

title: torres1_wrong3
body:
<<Torres>><<TAngry>>  ...seriously?
<<Stanley>><<SSilly>>  ...Did I get you?
<<Torres>><<TMiff>>  Leave me alone, Stanley. I've got better things to be doing.
<<Stanley>><<STalk>>  Wait, hold on now, my friend! There really [i]is[/i] something I need to talk to you about!
<<Torres>> [i]Sighs[/i] This better actually be important, else I'm kicking you out of my room myself.
[[torres1_check]]

title: GoodEnding
body: <<Stanley>><<SHappy>>  There we go! The bar of chocolate has been obtained!

title: BadEnding
body:
<<Torres>><<TMiff>>  Stanley, I don't know what you're up to, but I don't have time for it! Get out of my room!
<<stanley>><<STalk>>  Wait, Torres, I really do need to--
<<Torres>><<TAngry>>  Get out, now!!!

title: torres1
body:
<<Stanley>> <<SShock>>  (Hmm... I need to figure out a way to distract Torres from her axe, so that I can shave some chocolate off of it. What should I say?)
[[Krie needs your help with something.|torres1_correct]]
[[There's a crying child that needs comforting.|torres1_wrong1]]
[[A cat got stuck up on a tree, and it can't get down!|torres1_wrong2]]
[[Your shoelaces are untied!|torres1_wrong3]]

title: torres2
body:
<<Stanley>><<STalk>>  (Now, what's something that Her Majesty would ask Torres to do?)
[[You have to bake a cupcake for her!|torres2_wrong1]]
[[She needed to talk to you about something important.|torres2_correct]]
[[She needs you to clean the greenhouse!|torres2_wrong2]]
[[She wants you to entertain the children!|torres2_wrong3]]

title: torres2_wrong1
body:
<<Torres>><<TMiff>>  She wants [i]me[/i] to bake a cupcake for her? I find that hard to believe, even for Her Majesty. Are you sure you got that right?
<<Stanley>><<SSilly>>  Oh! On second thought, I must've gotten my thoughts mixed up! My apologies for the confusion, Torres.
<<Torres>>  Right...
<<Stanley>><<STalk>>  In any case, the actual errand entrusted to you was...
[[torres2_check]]

title: torres2_correct
body:
<<Torres>><<TMiff>>  Her Majesty wishes to talk to me? What about?
<<Stanley>><<STalk>>  She didn't say, but it seemed urgent. You shouldn't keep Her Majesty waiting!
<<Torres>><<TTalk>>  Hm. Very well, then. This had better be important...
<<Stanley>> (Wonderful! Now that she's gone, I can just...)
[[GoodEnding]]

title: torres2_wrong2
body:
<<Torres>><<TTalk>>  The greenhouse? Last I checked, the two of you were at the greenhouse earlier today.
<<Stanley>><<SSilly>>  Oh, well, um...
<<Torres>><<TMiff>>  Besides, even though Her Majesty can be rather irresponsible, I doubt she'd leave her precious greenhouse a mess. Stanley, are you messing with me?
<<Stanley>><<STalk>>  I wouldn't dare, my friend! I simply misremembered Her Majesty's message. What I meant to say was...
[[torres2_check]]

title: torres2_wrong3
body:
<<Torres>><<TMiff>>  ...shouldn't that be [i]your[/i] job as court jester, Stanley? Why would she ask me to do that?
<<Stanley>><<SSilly>>  Oh... yes, how silly of me! I got my memories mixed up, my apologies. What I meant to say was...
[[torres2_check]]

title: torres1_check
body:
<<Stanley>> (I think Torres is getting suspicious of me! If I mess up too many times, she might kick me out of her room!)
[[torres1]]

title: torres2_check
body:
<<Stanley>><<SCrazy>>  (I think Torres is getting suspicious of me! If I mess up too many times, she might kick me out of her room!)
[[torres2]]
